positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic mountain landscape at sunrise. The scene features crisp, overlapping silhouettes of pine trees and jagged peaks against a gradient sky that transitions from deep indigo to warm peach and soft gold. The composition is balanced and centered, with strong negative space defining the sky and emphasizing the sharp contrast of the forest silhouettes. The style should be graphic and modern, reminiscent of linocut printmaking or negative space art, using solid colors and clean lines. Ideal for apparel printing, with a strong central motif. Cinematic, highly detailed, vector-art quality, perfect for t-shirts.
